C:\Users\Admin\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-13.0.0-r1\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\dsa_test.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\Admin\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-13.0.0-r1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\dsa_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\dsa_test.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\Admin\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-13.0.0-r1\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\dsa_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o dsa_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdsa_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\dsa_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
